search.no_results_hint: Try different keywords or check your spelling.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.preference_url_copy_failed: Copy failed - copy the URL manually
preferences.reset_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to reset all preferences?
preferences.required_fields_error: Please fill in all required fields
preferences.bang_shortcut_exists: A bang with this shortcut already exists
preferences.subtitle: Customize your search experience. Settings are saved locally in your browser.
preferences.search_bangs_help_prefix: Bangs let you search other sites directly. Type
preferences.search_bangs_help_google: before your search to use Google
preferences.homepage_widgets_help: Enable widgets to display on the homepage. These let you access useful information at a glance.
preferences.homepage_widgets_tip: Tip: You can also configure individual widget settings by clicking the gear icon on each widget on the homepage.
preferences.custom_bangs_help: Create your own bang shortcuts. These are saved in your browser.
preferences.url_template_help_suffix: as placeholder for the search term
preferences.add_to_browser_help: Add this search engine to your browser's search bar.
preferences.add_to_browser_instructions: Most browsers support adding custom search engines. Look for the search bar settings in your browser preferences, or right-click on the search box on the homepage.
preferences.data_management_help: Export/import preserves your saved search defaults, homepage widgets, and custom bangs.
preferences.shareable_link_help: Generate a portable prefs string for theme, default category, safe search, results per page, new-tab behavior, pagination mode, and keyboard shortcuts.

errors.rate_limit: Too many requests, please try again later
errors.session_expired: Session expired, please log in again
errors.network_error: Network error, please check your connection

tokens_page.name: Name
tokens_page.description_placeholder: What this token is used for

logs_page.log_directory_description: Server logs are written to the configured log directory.
logs_page.view_logs_description: Use these commands to view logs:
logs_page.audit_logs_description: For security audit logs (login attempts, config changes, etc.), visit:

audit_logs_page.title: Audit Logs
audit_logs_page.description: Security audit trail for administrative actions.

scheduler_page.title: Scheduled Tasks
scheduler_page.description: Manage background tasks that run on a schedule.
scheduler_page.backup_description: Create automatic backups of configuration and data
scheduler_page.log_rotation_description: Rotate and compress old log files
scheduler_page.engine_health_description: Verify all search engines are responding

backup_page.description: Create a backup of your database, configuration, and data files.

maintenance_page.title: Maintenance Mode
maintenance_page.description: When enabled, all users will see a maintenance page. Admins can still access the admin panel.

updates_page.description: Check if a newer version is available.
updates_page.click_to_check: Click the button below to check for updates.
updates_page.latest_version: You are running the latest version.

network_page.description: Configure network-related settings including Tor hidden service and GeoIP filtering.
network_page.tor_description: Enable access via Tor for privacy-conscious users. Provides a .onion address for anonymous access.
network_page.geoip_description: Block or allow access based on geographic location. Uses MaxMind-compatible MMDB databases.

geoip_page.title: GeoIP Configuration
geoip_page.description: Uses MMDB format databases from sapics/ip-location-db (free, no API key required).
geoip_page.allow_only_countries: Allow Only Countries (leave empty for no restriction)

metrics_page.title: Prometheus Metrics
metrics_page.description: Expose Prometheus-compatible metrics endpoint for monitoring.
metrics_page.bearer_token_help: If set, requests must include: Authorization: Bearer <token>
metrics_page.cpu_time_used: CPU time used (if system metrics enabled)

email_page.title: Email / SMTP Configuration
email_page.description: Email is automatically enabled when SMTP host is configured.
email_page.smtp_host_help: Leave empty to auto-detect local SMTP server

ssl_page.title: SSL/TLS Configuration
ssl_page.certificate_file_help: Path to the SSL certificate file (PEM format)
ssl_page.key_file_help: Path to the private key file (PEM format)
ssl_page.acme_challenge_help: Select how Let's Encrypt verifies domain ownership
ssl_page.dns_provider_help: Select your DNS provider for DNS-01 challenge

tor_page.title: Tor Hidden Service
tor_page.description: Per AI.md PART 32: Tor is automatically enabled when the tor binary is found.
tor_page.binary_path_help: Leave empty to auto-detect. Common locations: /usr/bin/tor, /usr/local/bin/tor
tor_page.vanity_description: Generate a custom .onion address with a memorable prefix (max 6 characters for built-in generation).
tor_page.key_management_description: Export or import hidden service keys. Useful for backup or using externally-generated vanity addresses.
tor_page.regenerate_warning: Regenerating will create a new .onion address. The old address will no longer work.
tor_page.invalid_prefix: Invalid prefix: use a-z and 2-7 only
tor_page.regenerate_confirm: Are you sure? This will create a new .onion address and the old one will stop working.

settings_page.https_port: HTTPS Port (optional, for dual port mode)
settings_page.alert_creations_per_ip: Alert creations per IP per hour

widgets_ui.tracking_status_placeholder: Enter a tracking number to check status
widgets_ui.qr_empty_placeholder: Enter text to generate QR code
widgets_ui.weather_empty: Set your city in widget settings
widgets_ui.settings_unavailable: No settings available for this widget.
widgets_ui.settings_weather_city_hint: Enter a city (e.g., "Albany, NY" or "Paris, France")
widgets_ui.settings_weather_location_requires_https: Location requires HTTPS. Please enter a city (e.g., "London" or "Paris, France").
widgets_ui.settings_weather_location_permission_den: Location permission denied. Enter a city (e.g., "Albany, NY").
widgets_ui.settings_weather_location_unavailable: Location unavailable. Enter a city (e.g., "London, UK").
widgets_ui.settings_weather_location_timeout: Location timed out. Enter a city (e.g., "Paris, France").
widgets_ui.settings_weather_location_failed: Could not get location. Enter a city (e.g., "Tokyo, Japan").
widgets_ui.settings_weather_location_unsupported: Geolocation not supported. Enter a city (e.g., "New York, NY").

accessibility.keyboard_help_opened: Keyboard shortcuts help opened. Press Escape or ? to close.

about.privacy_first_description: No tracking, no profiling, no filter bubbles. Your searches stay private.
about.multiple_sources_description: Aggregates results from DuckDuckGo, Brave, Wikipedia, and more.
about.instant_answers_description: Get quick answers for calculations, conversions, definitions, and more.
about.direct_answers_description: 49+ operators for IP lookup, DNS, WHOIS, encoding, and developer tools.
about.tor_support_description: Access via Tor hidden service for maximum anonymity.
about.responsive_design_description: Works on any device - desktop, tablet, or mobile.
about.no_javascript_description: Core functionality works without JavaScript enabled.
about.api_docs_description: This application provides REST and GraphQL APIs with interactive documentation.
about.open_source_description: This search engine is free and open source software. You can host your own instance and maintain complete control over your search experience.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Have questions, feedback, or need help? Send us a message using the form below.
contact.success_default: Thank you for your message. We'll respond soon.

privacy.data_collection_description: %s is designed with privacy as a core principle. We minimize data collection to what is strictly necessary for the service to function.
privacy.search_queries_description: Your search queries are sent to upstream search engines but are not stored on our servers.
privacy.ip_addresses_description: We do not log IP addresses or use them for tracking.
privacy.cookies_description: We only use essential cookies for session management and user preferences (like theme settings).
privacy.data_usage_description: Any data that is temporarily processed is used only to:
privacy.data_usage_item_forward: Forward your search query to upstream search engines
privacy.data_usage_item_aggregate: Aggregate and display results to you
privacy.data_retention_description: We do not retain search queries or personal data. Session data is temporary and is deleted when you close your browser or your session expires.
privacy.third_parties_description: Your search queries are forwarded to upstream search engines to retrieve results. We do not share any other data with third parties.
privacy.third_parties_followup: Each upstream search engine has its own privacy policy. We recommend reviewing them if you have concerns.
privacy.session_cookie_description: To maintain your session (if logged in)
privacy.preference_cookie_description: To remember your theme and language preferences when cookie consent allows them
privacy.cookies_followup: We do not use tracking cookies, analytics cookies, or advertising cookies.
privacy.your_rights_description: Since we don't store personal data, there is no data to access, modify, or delete. Your privacy is protected by design.
privacy.contact_prefix: If you have questions about our privacy practices, please

terms.acceptance_description: By accessing or using %s ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Service.
terms.description_body: %s is a privacy-respecting metasearch engine that aggregates results from multiple search engines. The Service is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind.
terms.user_conduct_item_unlawful: Use the Service for any unlawful purpose
terms.user_conduct_item_access: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the Service or its systems
terms.user_conduct_item_disrupt: Interfere with or disrupt the Service
terms.user_conduct_item_automated: Use automated means to access the Service in a manner that exceeds reasonable use
terms.user_conduct_item_reverse_engineering: Attempt to reverse engineer, decompile, or extract source code from the Service
terms.privacy_prefix: Your use of the Service is also governed by our
terms.privacy_suffix: . We are committed to protecting your privacy and minimizing data collection.
terms.intellectual_property_description: The Service and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by the operators of %s and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
terms.intellectual_property_followup: Search results displayed are the property of their respective owners and are subject to their own terms and conditions.
terms.third_party_content_description: The Service aggregates results from third-party search engines. We do not control or endorse the content returned by these search engines. Your use of third-party content is at your own risk.
terms.disclaimer_intro: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED. WE DO NOT WARRANT THAT:
terms.disclaimer_item_uninterrupted: The Service will be uninterrupted or error-free
terms.disclaimer_item_accurate: Search results will be accurate, complete, or current
terms.limitation_description: IN NO EVENT SHALL THE OPERATORS OF %s BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO YOUR USE OF THE SERVICE.
terms.modifications_description: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the Service at any time without notice. We shall not be liable to you or any third party for any modification, suspension, or discontinuation.
terms.changes_description: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. We will notify users of any material changes by updating the "Last updated" date. Your continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.contact_prefix: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please

alerts.create_subtitle: Get notified when new results match this search.
alerts.manage_subtitle: Update delivery channels, frequency, or pause this alert.
alerts.engine_filters_help: Leave all unchecked to monitor all enabled engines.
alerts.email_unavailable_help: Email delivery is unavailable until SMTP is configured. RSS and webhook alerts still work, but email notifications are hidden.
alerts.check_email_confirm: Check your email to confirm and activate this alert.
alerts.confirmed_subtitle: Your search alert is now active.
alerts.error_invalid_token: This alert verification token is invalid or has already been used.
alerts.error_not_found: The requested alert could not be found.
alerts.error_delivery_channel_required: Choose at least one delivery channel.
alerts.error_email_required: Email delivery requires a valid contact email and SMTP configuration.
alerts.error_webhook_required: Webhook URL is required when webhook delivery is enabled.
alerts.error_unknown_engine: One or more selected engines are unavailable.

cookie_consent.default_message: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience. By continuing to use this site, you agree to our use of cookies.

help.title: Help & Documentation
help.subtitle: Learn how to get the most out of %s

getting_started.heading: Getting Started
getting_started.intro_prefix: %s is a privacy-respecting metasearch engine. Simply type your query in the search box and press
getting_started.no_tracking: Unlike traditional search engines, we don't track you, store your search history, or create a profile about you.

categories.heading: Search Categories
categories.intro: Use the category tabs to narrow the engines and result types used for your search.

music.label: Music
music.description: Songs, artists, albums, and music videos

operators.heading: Search Operators
operators.intro: Refine your searches with these operators:
operators.intext: Find word in page body text
operators.related: Sites similar to a given URL
operators.cache: Cached or archived copies of a URL

shortcuts.heading: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.intro: Keyboard shortcuts work best on search and results pages. They never replace normal navigation, so everything still works without JavaScript.
shortcuts.open_tab_or_new: Open the selected result in the current tab or a new tab
shortcuts.prev_next_page: Go to the previous or next page of results
shortcuts.first_last: Jump to the first or last result

privacy.heading: Privacy Features
privacy.no_tracking_text: We don't track your searches or create user profiles
privacy.no_history_text: Your searches are not stored on our servers
privacy.sanitized_links_text: Common tracking parameters are stripped from result URLs before they are shown
privacy.tor_support_prefix: Access via Tor hidden service for maximum anonymity
privacy.minimal_cookies_text: Only essential cookies for preferences (no analytics)
privacy.open_source_text: Full source code available for audit

tor.heading: Tor Access
tor.intro: This application is available as a Tor hidden service for enhanced privacy.
tor.pending_note: Tor address will be available once the hidden service connects to the Tor network.
tor.step_open: Open Tor Browser and wait for it to connect
tor.step_paste: Copy the onion address above and paste it into the Tor Browser address bar
tor.footer_note: Using Tor provides additional privacy by hiding your IP address and encrypting your connection through the Tor network.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q_results_diff: Why are results different from Google?
faq.a_results_diff: We aggregate results from multiple sources without personalization. Results aren't filtered based on your history, location, or profile, so they may differ from what you see on personalized search engines.
faq.q_tor_access_summary: How do I access via Tor?
faq.a_tor_access_see_section: See the Tor Access section above for the address and instructions.
faq.a_self_host_prefix: Yes! This is free and open source software.
faq.a_self_host_repo: Check our source code repository for installation instructions.
faq.q_engines: What search engines do you use?
faq.a_engines: We aggregate results from multiple engines including Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Brave, Qwant, Mojeek, Yahoo, Yandex, Baidu, Startpage, Wikipedia, arXiv, PubMed, GitHub, Hacker News, Reddit, YouTube, OpenStreetMap, and Wolfram Alpha.
faq.a_instant: Many instant answers are generated locally for calculations, formatting, conversions, parsing, and text tools. Some lookups query remote sources or your configured search backends when that is required for the feature.

need_more.heading: Need More Help?
need_more.text_prefix: If you have questions or need assistance, please

api.heading: API Documentation
api.intro: This application exposes REST endpoints, direct-answer APIs, GraphQL, and an OpenAPI description for integrations and automation.
api.openapi_desc: Interactive REST API explorer with try-it-out functionality
api.graphql_desc: Interactive GraphQL explorer with schema documentation
api.ep_related: Related search suggestions for a query
api.ep_openapi: OpenAPI UI and raw OpenAPI specification

bangs.heading: Bang Commands
bangs.intro_prefix: Bang commands send your search directly to another site. Use either
bangs.intro_suffix: . Built-in bangs are available, and server or user-defined bangs can be added on top.
bangs.ex_ddg_desc: Send the query to DuckDuckGo from the end of the search

direct.heading: Instant & Direct Answers
direct.intro_da_text_suffix: format and open as full-page results.
direct.intro_ia_text: are triggered from the regular search box and can also be accessed over the API.

dev.heading: Developer Tools
dev.yaml: Format YAML or convert JSON and YAML

text.heading: Text Tools
text.lorem: Lorem ipsum text (paragraphs, words, or sentences)

cache.heading: Cache & Archive
cache.rotl: Rules of the Internet direct answer
